description: A horizontal graphic with a black and dark-red background. A central blue and gold shield badge reads 2026 NATIONAL POLICE WEEK with a banner across it reading RESPECT. HONOR. REMEMBER., and a red rose laid across the badge. White text on the left reads May 13, 2026, Julie Myers Conference Center. Faint framed memorial plaques and additional roses appear at the right.
notable_text: 2026 NATIONAL POLICE WEEK; RESPECT. HONOR. REMEMBER.; May 13, 2026; Julie Myers Conference Center
